title: The Dismissal of Manger b. Jumhur from the Post of Governor of Iraq
description: The Dismissal of Manger b. Jumhur from the Post of Governor of Iraq. Recorded under the year 126 AH (744–745 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 26.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 26
